resources.string: Your device's storage is full. Please, delete something and try again.
File, that you are searching for, was not found...
Bad request: please, check, that the data you are trying to send, is correct.
You are unauthorized: please, check your credentials.
Sorry, you are not allowed to access this content.
The resource, you are looking for, was not found.
A conflict happened... Maybe this data is already exist?
You are sending too many requests. Please, try again later.
The data, you are trying to attach, is too large.
Server unavailable... Please, try again later.
Something went wrong... Request redirection error.
Failed to convert a JSON result.
